MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-18-2022 -- APPEARANCES BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFFS ZHEN ZHOU AND JIANSHAN FENG; JEFFREY VUCUNICH, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT WARREN LEE -- CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON AUG-17-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO COURT SETTLEMENT SPECIALIST, PANG LY, IN DEPT. 603. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT MS. LY BY EMAIL BY 4:00 PM ON 7/20/22 FOR SCHEDULING OF THE MSC. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON AUG-17-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE. AIDONG NI, COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT AND ASSISTED THE PLAINTIFFS. PER JUDGE FENG, COURT TO PROVIDE MANDARIN INTERPRETER AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
